_comment: Relocatable CPython (python-build-standalone, PSF) downloaded at first iOS-toolchain setup to build the MVT venv. NOT bundled in the app: Apple's notary inspects inside tarballs and would reject CPython's unsigned Mach-O binaries. Download-only, hash-verified, user-consented (same model as the MVT/IoC fetch). Keep release/pyver in sync with scripts/fetch-python-runtime.sh.
